$MSFT partners with SpaceX’s Starlink to expand internet access in rural and hard-to-reach regions.

Early rollout in Kenya connects 450+ community hubs by pairing satellite broadband with digital tools to pull agriculture and local economies online.
$DOCN now up over 10%  😏

Software is getting repriced because the market doesn't trust which business models will matter a decade from now. 

The category grows but the winners concentrate with $PLTR emerging as the decision layer for AI agents & $NET as the connectivity layer.
Anthropic clearly trying to become the default AI layer inside enterprise workflows by using plugins as wedges to embed Claude across HR, finance, engineering & ops until it becomes infrastructure.

$META plans to relaunch stablecoin payments in 2H2026 with a new digital wallet.

The company is re-entering crypto rails after its earlier failed attempt.

Anthropic rolled out new enterprise features for Claude Cowork to automate workflows across HR, investment banking & design teams.

The update adds deeper plugins, admin controls, auditability, connectors & smoother handoffs between tools like $MSFT Excel + PowerPoint.

$GOOGL will build its first data center in Minnesota on a 480-acre site in Pine Island.

The project includes new renewable energy commitments with utility partner $XEL.
$HIMS DOWN OVER 10%

$GOOGL Waymo is launching rider service in Dallas, Houston, San Antonio & Orlando.

Another step in scaling autonomous ride-hailing across major U.S. metros.

Wild how $AMD went from “promising alternative” to being deployed in two of the largest AI buildouts on Earth with ~12GW committed between $META & OpenAI.

If Helios is competitive vs $NVDA Rubin on performance-per-watt-per-dollar then this is AMD’s first real shot in a decade at meaningful top-end GPU share.

$GOOGL plans to build a new data center in Wilbarger County, Texas.

The company continues to expand U.S. data center capacity.

Jamie Dimon says $JPM LLM is used by 150K employees weekly but the productivity gains don’t show up cleanly in near-term financials. 

He remains more cautious on the economy given geopolitical, fiscal and trade uncertainty.

$AAPL says it’s on pace to purchase over 100M advanced chips from $TSM Arizona facility.

Another data point in the shift toward U.S.-based semiconductor manufacturing.

$META just committed $100B over 5 years to $AMD as well as 6 GW of AI compute & warrants worth up to 10% of the company. 

AMD problem was always credibility since hyperscalers wouldn’t commit because they weren’t sure AMD could deliver at scale, support the software stack & iterate fast enough.

Zuckerberg just answered the credibility question for them.

$AMD and $META signed a multi-year deal for up to 6GW of Instinct GPUs to power Meta’s AI infrastructure.

The first 1GW ships in 2H26 using a custom MI450 + “Venice” EPYC with AMD issuing Meta a performance warrant tied to delivery milestones.

$AAPL plans to begin producing some Mac mini units in Houston at a Foxconn facility in 2026.

This marks the first time Mac mini production will take place in the U.S.

$IREN is converting BC sites to GPUs and moving Sweetwater’s 1.4GW substation toward grid interconnection.

That’s the infrastructure required to monetize AI compute rather than remain a pure power and data center owner.

Goodbye exotic swap desks, hello simple contracts.

The rise of prediction markets will change the game when it comes to hedging your portfolio 💰

$GOOG $MSFT $ORCL

Amazon has also spent more on capex from 2023 through 2025, than it had in the prior 26 years combined, per Bloomberg.

$spy morning glance as $680 range support helps again while we get a few RDR tactical buys in broken areas for cash flow

$JPM from an options structure continues to be put dominated and at the lower portion of the transition level (grey box) . This structure will need to improve and repair itself to have the opportunity for upside price appreciation. The 290 strike to the downside is an opportunity for supportive price action. A move above the 305 strike would increase the possibility of upside movement toward 325.

📺 HOW I TRADE A BRUTAL RANGE-BOUND MARKET

This is a classic range-bound, frustrating tape, not the environment to be aggressive.

We’re still stuck in defined ranges on both $SPY and $QQQ, even though underneath the surface, a lot of stocks — especially software $IGV — are breaking down and making lower lows.

The AI disruption narrative continues to pressure parts of tech, particularly software, finance, and potentially cloud/enterprise if new announcements hit.

$SPY failed to hold $686, triggering a move down toward the low end of the range (around $680). Now the question is whether price reclaims and holds above $686, or gets rejected again. 

If $686 breaks convincingly, one candle can quickly negate the prior ones, creating sharp downside continuation. The next major level to watch is $675 — if that breaks, downside accelerates. A 5% correction sits around $662.

$QQQ has been weaker than $SPY. Failure to hold $605 led to a move toward $600. Now the question is whether it reclaims $600 and holds, or gets rejected and stays in the lower quadrant of the range.

Again, same dynamic: range trading, not trending.

Given uncertainty ahead of $NVDA earnings and potential AI-related news, I added $677 puts, just in case the range breaks lower.

When volatility expansion and trend return, that’s when you push size and make meaningful money. So, for now, be safe, stay sane, and be profitable.

If you enjoyed this video, please ❤️like and 🔁retweet

$JPM is sitting right on the 200-day after the analyst meeting where Diamond tried to sound optimistic. Watch $295ish because that’s a huge level. $324 is the sell area, while $305 is the nearby spot in between.

$IGV has stayed under the 8-day since breaking below the $104 wedge-type pattern. It recently tried to hold $79.27 but broke it yesterday to see $76.42, so use $76.42 as the active pivot. Hard to tell what’s next here, except we don’t catch falling knives.
$QQQ Now we watch to see if early strength holds or fades — key question is whether $604.50 now rejects price.

4 Questions to Ask Yourself Before 6:30 a.m. Every Day

#1: Why Am I Even Awake?

You need time to get your head together in the morning. Big winning days start in the premarket, not at 9:30 am.

#2: Am I Ready to Execute With Confidence?

A clear plan for action gives you the mental edge you need to react in the moment. The more you plan, the faster you can move.

#3: Do I Know What’s on the Calendar?

The price action brings plenty of surprises on its own. So know what’s happening, and how it all affects your positions.

#4: Am I Watching Scott Redler’s #630club?

I go live Monday to Thursday at 6:30 am ET to get you ready for the day. 100% free for my community.

Hope to see you there!

Don’t hate Bitcoin.

Hate the stupid narratives, overconfidence, and attacks on those who express doubts on those narratives.
I too can pick random start dates.
I was going to buy that 800 page bitcoin study guide put out by Wiley, but now it hardly seems worth it.

Now imagine if they had been sensible people instead of religious fanatics and studied hundreds of hours of Bitcoin and thousands of hours of risk management and profit-taking and trading principles in general.

Actually the smartest thing is to expect something that never happened.

That’s where real wealth is built - in the outlier.
Small sample size + pretty colors = half of crypto Twitter analysis 😅

Attn “entire world”…. Btc is a speculative asset…. And… that’s ok. Call it what it is. The btc cult loses legitimacy when they try to dress it up as anything else.  It’s been successful as a speculative asset. Rake your profit chips from the table. Go get a beer and detox.

After 3 years, when we seperated, she returned exactly $100.

I lost interest in that relationship

Can I get my kidney back

this quote from Carl Jung hits so hard.

“The world is full of people suffering from the effects of their own unlived life. They become bitter, critical, or rigid, not because the world is cruel to them, but because they have betrayed their own inner possibilities. The artist who never makes art becomes cynical about those who do. The lover who never risks loving mocks romance. The thinker who never commits to a philosophy sneers at belief itself. And yet, all of them suffer, because deep down they know: the life they mock is the life they were meant to live.”
A lost decade for Bitcoin would absolutely kill all narratives around Bitcoin.

Whatever happened to all those correlation charts showing liquidity and Bitcoin being tied together?

Maybe - just maybe - your sample size was too fucking small?

I said throughout 2021 and 2022 that “When an investment becomes a religion it’s time to lose faith” and got crucified for it.

All those people are fucking quiet now.

I never made it personal but they did.
